headline: AM Best Affirms Credit Ratings of Chubb Seguros de Vida Chile, S.A.
summary: MEXICO CITY, March 12, 2026--AM Best has affirmed the Financial Strength Rating of A+ (Superior) and the Long-Term Issuer Credit Rating of "aa-" (Superior) of Chubb Seguros de Vida Chile, S.A. (Chubb Vida Chile) (Chile). The outlook of these Credit Ratings (ratings) is stable.

raw.headline: AM Best Affirms Credit Ratings of Chubb Seguros de Vida Chile, S.A.
raw.summary: MEXICO CITY, March 12, 2026--AM Best has affirmed the Financial Strength Rating of A+ (Superior) and the Long-Term Issuer Credit Rating of "aa-" (Superior) of Chubb Seguros de Vida Chile, S.A. (Chubb Vida Chile) (Chile). The outlook of these Credit Ratings (ratings) is stable.

headline: Chubb partners with US agency on $20 billion reinsurance plan for Strait shipping
summary: Program backed by the US International Development Finance Corp. aims to revive vessels crossing the Strait of Hormuz after war disrupted a major global oil route.

headline: Iran War: U.S. Navy will escort oil tankers through Strait of Hormuz when 'militarily possible,' Bessent tells Sky News
summary: The Strait of Hormuz has been effectively closed to shipping because of the war against Iran by the U.S. and Israel.

headline: Chubb (CB) Declares $0.97 Quarterly Dividend
summary: Chubb Limited (NYSE:CB) is included among the 13 Undervalued Dividend Aristocrats to Buy Now.
